title: Late payments research: impact on the UK economy
body: "This research includes:    a quantitative survey of businesses affected by late payments, asking how late payments impacts their day-to-day operations and the mitigating actions they might take   econometric analysis of secondary data to assess the impact of late payments on business outcomes, like survival and investment   a quantification exercise which combines findings from the quantitative survey and econometric analysis and estimates the total economic cost for UK businesses and the wider economy   "
